wins: Strong year-on-year revenue growth in Global Banking & Markets and Asset & Wealth Management
Record $3.2 billion in private banking and lending revenues
Exceeded $36 billion in alternatives fundraising year-to-date
Record $2.9 trillion in assets under supervision
risks: Still operating below 10-year average in M&A activity
Uncertainty around SCB and Basel III Endgame
Potential for slower growth in private equity-related M&A
Pressure on sponsors to monetize assets
